allow:
Bash(git add CLAUDE.md && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
docs: update CLAUDE.md with audit corrections

- Fix storage bucket name: 'image' → 'images'
- Add lucide-react, Capacitor deps to tech stack
- Add missing files to file structure \(android/, capacitor.config.ts, tailwind.config.js, vercel.json, .env\)
- Fix state variable count: ~80+ → ~95, add comprehensive state group listing
- Add footer nav items to navigation section
- Reclassify tables: profiles, article_likes/saves, saved_events, event_registrations noted as not referenced in frontend
- Mark page_views, article_reads, daily_stats as not yet integrated
- Add Phase 0 \(push notification removal\) to roadmap
- Note unused state variables for cleanup
- Remove PWA push notification references

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add package.json src/App.js && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: remove push notifications and Firebase entirely

- Remove all Firebase imports, config, initialization, and VAPID key
- Remove service worker update mechanism
- Remove NotificationModal component \(~160 lines\)
- Remove IOSInstructionsBanner component \(~30 lines\)
- Remove 5 notification state variables
- Remove 8 notification functions \(initializePushNotifications, savePushSubscription,
  loadNotificationPreferences, saveNotificationPreferences, enableNotifications,
  disableNotifications, checkNotificationStatus, sendNotificationToUsers\)
- Remove 3 notification-related useEffect hooks \(load prefs, launch notification,
  Capacitor push listeners\)
- Remove web foreground message handler useEffect
- Remove service worker message listener for notification clicks
- Remove notification bell from mobile header
- Remove "Notify Users" buttons from article and event admin forms
- Replace Bell icons in CTA/signup sections with Star icons
- Update privacy policy text to remove notification/Firebase references
- Remove firebase and @capacitor/push-notifications from package.json
- Remove Smartphone from lucide-react imports \(only used by IOSInstructionsBanner\)

App.js reduced from 10,923 to 9,862 lines \(-1,061 lines\)
Bundle size reduced by 3.16 kB \(gzipped\)
Build compiles cleanly with no errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add src/App.js && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: remove Komuniteti page \(polls, discussions, community\)

- Remove DiscussionPageContent component \(~175 lines\)
- Remove all community state variables \(topics, selectedTopic, topicPosts, newPost,
  showRulesExpanded, communityCategory, activePoll, userPollVote, pollResults,
  showAddTopicForm, topicFormData, showAddPollForm, pollFormData\)
- Remove community functions \(loadTopics, loadActivePoll, loadPollResults, votePoll,
  createPoll, loadPosts, submitPost, deletePost, deleteTopic, handleSubmitTopic\)
- Remove Komuniteti page rendering and discussion page rendering
- Remove Komuniteti from bottom nav, desktop nav, hamburger menu
- Remove homepage poll widget \("Sondazhi i Javës"\)
- Remove Komunitet card from homepage Zbulo section
- Remove URL parameter handling for ?poll= and ?discussion=
- Remove community_voice badge definition
- Remove Add Topic and Add Poll form modals
- Remove topic button from admin FAB
- Clean up posts table reference in handleDeleteAccount

App.js: 9,862 → 8,415 lines \(-1,447 lines\)
Build compiles cleanly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add src/App.js && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: remove Schools and School Portal pages

Removed all school-related code: SchoolsOverviewPage, SchoolPortalPage,
submit/delete/edit functions, form modals, nav entries, and FAB button.
Removed unused School and Trophy icon imports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add src/App.js && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: hide Shiko page from all navigation menus

Removed Shiko from desktop nav and hamburger menu.
ShikoPage component and rendering code kept dormant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add src/App.js && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: remove unused LogIn import to fix CI build

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)
